topic: Practical OpenAI and ChatGPT usage patterns, real use cases

entries.q: What is the OpenAI Cookbook and where can I access it
entries.a: The OpenAI Cookbook is a resource for example code and guides on using the OpenAI API, accessible at cookbook.openai.com

entries.q: What do I need to run the examples in the OpenAI Cookbook
entries.a: To run the examples, you need an OpenAI account and an associated API key

entries.q: How can I set up my OpenAI API key in my development environment
entries.a: You can set an environment variable called OPENAI_API_KEY with your API key, or create an .env file with the key in the root of your repository

entries.q: What programming language are the code examples in the OpenAI Cookbook written in
entries.a: Most code examples are written in Python, but the concepts can be applied in any language

entries.q: What type of license does the OpenAI Cookbook use
entries.a: The OpenAI Cookbook uses the MIT License

entries.q: Where can I find additional resources for learning about OpenAI and the API
entries.a: You can find related resources, guides, and courses on the OpenAI Cookbook website, at cookbook.openai.com/related_resources

entries.q: How do I create a free OpenAI account to get started with the API
entries.a: You can create a free OpenAI account by signing up at platform.openai.com/signup
